description: NodeContainer (OBJ05) instances — scoped graph partitions that own, link, and synchronise node subgraphs. Stratum S2 (structural) or S3 (runtime). Source morphisms: LINK_NODES, SYNC_ACTIVE_STATE. Target morphisms: OWNS, CAN_HYDRATE, LINK_NODES, ADD_NODE_CONTAINER.

entries.label: Workspace Root Container
entries.description: Top-level NodeContainer scoping the entire moos workspace graph. Owns all top-level nodes seeded at boot. Links to kernel, template, tool, and identity subgraphs via LINK_NODES morphisms.

entries.label: Kernel Runtime Container
entries.description: Runtime NodeContainer for active kernel morphism state. Holds the live catamorphism fold context and the morphism-log store. Child of workspace-root.

notes: NodeContainer is often implicit in kernel boot (kernel node at S2 acts as root). These explicit entries allow hydration programs targeting OBJ05. The 'owns' and 'can_contain' fields are informational — actual graph wires are asserted by kernel morphisms.
